project.name: supernode
project.summary: Go-based Lumera validator companion service providing Cascade storage/retrieval, P2P/Kademlia routing and replication, gRPC/HTTP gateway APIs, SDK adapters, host/audit reporting, status metrics, CLI helpers, and system/integration tests.
project.bridge_note: Everlight compatibility work was completed outside the BRIDGE workflow. BRIDGE is being used retrospectively to capture requirements/context and gate evidence, not to plan unfinished Everlight implementation. As of this update, docs/requirements.json has been backfilled to capture F01-F06 and the S01 retrospective slice.

feature_status.name: Everlight host epoch report payload
feature_status.notes: Host reporter populates audit HostReport.CascadeKademliaDbBytes from local Kademlia SQLite data*.sqlite3* files, preserves disk usage reporting, and submits role-aware storage challenge observations. Marked done after retrospective gate PASS and operator evaluation approval on 2026-04-28.
evidence: git log: 2a97508 Everlight: supernode compatibility + p2p STORAGE_FULL eligibility gate (#284)

feature_status.name: Everlight supernode query wrappers
feature_status.notes: Supernode module exposes PoolState, SNEligibility, and PayoutHistory wrappers plus interface/mock/testutil updates. Marked done after retrospective gate PASS and operator evaluation approval on 2026-04-28.

feature_status.name: Everlight STORAGE_FULL P2P policy
feature_status.notes: P2P policy treats ACTIVE, POSTPONED, and STORAGE_FULL as routing/read-eligible, but only ACTIVE as store/write-eligible. New-key STORE and BatchStore paths reject when self is not store-eligible while preserving existing-key replication/read behavior. Marked done after retrospective gate PASS and operator evaluation approval on 2026-04-28.
evidence: git log: 2a97508 Everlight: supernode compatibility + p2p STORAGE_FULL eligibility gate (#284)

feature_status.name: Verifier STORAGE_FULL allowance
feature_status.notes: Supernode verifier accepts STORAGE_FULL as a valid state where appropriate. Marked done after retrospective gate PASS and operator evaluation approval on 2026-04-28.

feature_status.name: Host reporter test/devnet disable affordance
feature_status.notes: Setting LUMERA_SUPERNODE_DISABLE_HOST_REPORTER=1/true skips starting the on-chain host reporter so externally driven devnet epoch-report flows do not race account sequence. Marked done after retrospective gate PASS and operator evaluation approval on 2026-04-28.
evidence: git log: e349971 feat(host_reporter): add LUMERA_SUPERNODE_DISABLE_HOST_REPORTER test affordance (#285)

feature_status.name: LEP-5 availability commitment support
feature_status.notes: Cascade kit and SDK include availability commitment/Merkle proof challenge support. Marked done after retrospective gate PASS and operator evaluation approval on 2026-04-28.
evidence: git log: 3dd5fee feat: LEP-5 availability commitment support (Merkle proof challenge) (#274)

handoff.stopped_at: S01 retrospective Everlight gate and evaluation completed; F01-F06 marked done in BRIDGE after operator approval.
handoff.next_immediate: No required Everlight S01 work remains. Optional follow-ups: decide D02/S02 host reporter A3 log enrichment and D03/S03 readiness diagnostics, or explicitly move them to non_goals.
handoff.watch_out: Everlight implementation is done in code and now done in BRIDGE for F01-F06. D02 and D03 remain optional planned decisions, not blockers for S01 completion.

next_slice.goal: Optional decision: accept or scope out Everlight plan A3 structured log enrichment on host reporter success path.
acceptance_tests: Decision recorded: accept or scope-out the additional log fields.
If accepted: success log includes disk_usage_percent, cascade_kademlia_db_bytes, observations_count, assigned_targets_count with a unit test.

recent_decisions.decision: Backfilled docs/requirements.json with project/scope/features/user_flows/NFR/quality_gates/execution to capture the completed Everlight work (F01-F06) and the S01 retrospective slice, plus S02/S03 decision slices for D02/D03.
recent_decisions.rationale: S01 gate report (PASS) marked AT01 WAIVED because requirements.json was an empty placeholder. Backfilling resolves AT01 without re-opening implementation scope and addresses gate Recommended Action #3.

recent_decisions.decision: Treat code and docs/plans/everlight-supernode-compat-implementation-plan.md as the source for context sync because docs/requirements.json had not been backfilled after outside-BRIDGE Everlight work.
recent_decisions.rationale: BRIDGE canonical requirements were empty while implementation and recent commits showed substantial shipped behavior.

recent_decisions.decision: Represent Everlight as done in implementation but review in BRIDGE status until operator evaluation completes.
recent_decisions.rationale: The code work is complete outside BRIDGE; BRIDGE still requires operator-driven evaluation before moving features to done.

discrepancies.description: Everlight plan A3 requests success log fields epoch_id, disk_usage_percent, cascade_kademlia_db_bytes, observations_count, and assigned_targets_count. Current host reporter success log includes epoch_id and storage_challenge_observations_count only (verified at supernode/host_reporter/service.go:167).
discrepancies.proposed_fix: Decide via S02: either implement the missing structured log fields or revise requirements (NFR.observability) to drop them. Currently captured as an open question in requirements.json.

discrepancies.description: Everlight plan B2 recommends a compact runtime/admin diagnostics endpoint or command. Targeted inspection found query wrappers, but no dedicated Everlight readiness endpoint/command.
discrepancies.proposed_fix: Decide via S03: take in-scope (add new feature with ATs) or move to scope.non_goals in requirements.json. Currently captured as an open question.

gate_history.notes: Retrospective gate for Everlight work completed outside BRIDGE. AT01 was WAIVED because requirements.json was a placeholder; that finding is now addressed by the 2026-04-28 requirements backfill. Re-running the gate would convert AT01 to VERIFIED.

Re-run after docs/requirements.json backfill. AT01 (S01 exit criterion) converted from WAIVED to VERIFIED as expected. All other AT statuses, warnings (WebP env, D02, D03, sqlite3 const qualifier, make test-unit non-zero exit), and discrepancies unchanged. Targeted Everlight + LEP-5 + start-cmd Go tests pass; make build succeeds.

eval_history.feedback_notes: Operator reported all is good and requested marking the evaluated work as done.

open_questions: Should S02 implement Everlight plan A3 log fields (disk_usage_percent, cascade_kademlia_db_bytes, observations_count, assigned_targets_count) or should requirements be revised to drop them?
Is the Everlight plan B2 readiness diagnostics endpoint/command in scope for this release? If not, it should be moved from execution.recommended_slices to scope.non_goals.
